This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] from(): Errors thrown in async iterator's next() GETTER are propagated in a microtask
  assert_array_equals: lengths differ, expected array [] length 0, got [object "Error: next error"] length 1
[FAIL] from(): Aborting sync iterable midway through iteration both stops iteration and invokes `IteratorRecord#return()
  assert_array_equals: lengths differ, expected array ["IteratorRecord#next() pushing 0", "Observing 0", "IteratorRecord#next() pushing 1", "Observing 1", "IteratorRecord#next() pushing 2", "Observing 2", "IteratorRecord#next() pushing 3", "Observing 3", "IteratorRecord#return() called with this.val=4"] length 9, got ["IteratorRecord#next() pushing 0", "Observing 0", "IteratorRecord#next() pushing 1", "Observing 1", "IteratorRecord#next() pushing 2", "Observing 2", "IteratorRecord#next() pushing 3", "Observing 3", "IteratorRecord#next() pushing 4", "IteratorRecord#next() pushing 5", "IteratorRecord#next() pushing 6", "IteratorRecord#next() pushing 7", "IteratorRecord#next() pushing 8", "IteratorRecord#next() pushing 9", "IteratorRecord#next() pushing 10"] length 15
[FAIL] from(): Asynchronous iterable conversion, with synchronous iterable fallback
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: Object must be iterable"
[FAIL] from(): Async generator finally block run when subscription is aborted
  assert_true: expected true got false
Harness: the test ran to completion.
